feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Datasphere
feed.subtitle: SAP Datasphere Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Datasphere test tenant ?
entry.content:
Hello the community,

It seems that we do not have anymore a specific pricing for a test Tenant with Datasphere.

But I have also seen that the pricing has changed and we can have a Datasphere with only 1532 CU a month.

Is it still recommended to have two tenants and work with the lifecycle to transport between two systems, or should we have only one instance and export/import between spaces ? 

While with SAP Analytics Cloud we still have two tenants (one for test and one for production).

Thanks a lot for your inputs

Julien

entry.title: Cloud Connector with Error 425
entry.content:
Hello Team!

I'm trying to create a new connection settings using cloud connector. 

  1. I did logon to access Cloud Connector trought URL as usual
  2. On the left panel, I selected "Cloud to on-premise"

Under Access Control tab, I click in add (+) in order to create a new connection configuration and then I receive the follow error box:

"425 An internal error occurred. See ''Log And Trace Files'' and in particular ljs_trace.log for details"  

(See attached file)

Checking log file I did not found nothing regarding this error and even doing a search about this specific error I did not have lucky.

Does any one know something about this error message, any tips?

Thanks in advance.

SAP Datasphere  Cloud Connector

entry.title: Need Info on System Owner Permissions for SAC,DSP
entry.content: Hey everyone, we’re currently examining the permissions for SAP Analytics Cloud and Datasphere and are trying to understand how these differ from other roles. Our main focus is identifying tasks that specifically require System Owner permissions. For example, we’re aware that only system owners have the authority to modify settings like SSO and SAML. However, our documentation doesn't provide a clear outline of all the exclusive tasks and limitations. Can anyone provide insights on what exactly system owners can do that others can't? Any guidance or pointers would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Making an API call and unzipping a file in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are preparing a migration to Datasphere and one of our daily flows involves making an API call and unzipping a zipped csv file before processing it in BW. My question here is how can we do that in Datasphere?

We need the following:

1. Make an API call and retrieve the zipped file as the response payload.

2. Unzip the file 

3. Process the unzipped CSV file.

If these steps are not all possible in Datasphere, what would be the suggested approach?

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere connection to SAP ARIBA (SAP RISE Subs...
entry.content:
Precog is an approved and widely used data integration solution that makes it easy to get data from Ariba, SuccessFactors, Concur, Fieldglass, CX, S/4 HANA, Business One, Marketing Cloud, and more (2000+ SaaS APIs) into Datasphpere (and other data warehouses/databases): ELT for Datasphere.

Here's a good overview (video) of the AI-driven, no-code data integration (ELT) solution: Precog An SAP BTP Story

entry.title: SAP Datasphere - add user error
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have been using a TDD instance of SAP Datasphere for the last year fine, but we have started getting an error just by going into the manage/add users screen

The error comes up as soon as you enter the screen, and no user details are shown. Refreshing also gives the same error. Before I raise a support ticket, Is anybody else getting this or have any thoughts?

dberror(Connection.prepareStatement): 260 - invalid column name: UUID: line 1 col 28 (at pos 27)
Correlation ID: 65020833-5518-4116-9303-189623239140

thanks

entry.title: Not able to see run button on dataflow
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have created new SAP Datasphere tenant and we are not able to see run button for dataflow or neither on Data Integration Monitor( Run, Stop and Resume button ) .
Let us know if we are missing any configuration or role.

entry.title: How can we use a odata connection of datasphere to create datasets or models on sac?
entry.content:
How can we use a odata connection of datasphere to create datasets or models on sac?

fristly, we create a dataset with odata connection of datasphere but it only can choose a table or view of datasphere.   As below: 

 

 

 

 

secondly, if we use the api_url <https://.../api/v1/dwc/catalog/assets>, I suer that can't be connected on sac.

and we can get connection with <https://.../api/v1/dwc/catalog>, but we can't choose tables and views of datasphere, and we only can see space&assets

 

if we wanna use a odata connection to choose tables&views of datasphere, So how can we do for this?

 

Based lins:  https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/43509d67b8b84e66a30851e832f66911/7a453609c8694b029493e7d87e...

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-datasphere-analytical-and-relational-odata-...

https://api.sap.com/api/DatasphereCatalog/resource/

entry.title: Help Needed: Developing Reports on Invoices, Payments, and Inventory in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm upskilling and learning more about Datasphere. I am working on developing two reports in SAP Datasphere using CDS Views or tables with graphical views.

The first report is an invoice and on-time payment report. It needs to display invoice number, purchasing document number, the number and amounts of invoices, dates, payment terms, payment dates, payment amounts, and distinguish between early, on-time and late payments in days, movement type, customer etc

The second report is an inventory report showing current stock quantity and value, previous period stock quantity and value, storage location, plant, material, movement type, customer, and dates etc

I need help identifying the appropriate standard CDS views or tables for these reports and guidance on how to join them in graphical views. The final analytical views will be further processed in SAC. Any assistance would be greatly appreciated. Thanks!

entry.title: How to add SAP Datasphere as a datastore in Cloud Integration for data services?
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to create datastore in CPIDS and making "SAP HANA application cloud" connection type to Datasphere.
The selected application type as "HANA Cloud Platform HANA".

We have Schema and DB users are created in Datasphere. However we are not able to get the access key to establish connection.

How to get access key?

 

Also kindly help us if any documentation available for setting up the same. CPIDS(HCI) agents are on Linux.

 

Thanks

Mahesh V


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Different types of decimal types in dataset
entry.content:
Hi all

the problem that I have is that our data is from different countries. Which means that some people will use a '.' or a ',' as a decimal type. But Datasphere cannot work with both at the same time. Is there anyway I can fix this? This field could also be left empty or '0'. I already tried to make something (see pictures) but it still filters out some data.

Thanks for the help!

entry.title: Export SAP DATASPHERE Catalog
entry.content:
Hi and thank you in advance for your help.

Is it possible , for example , to extract all the KPI's defined on the SAP Datasphere catalog ?

From a quick check , 

from this url , i can get all the KPI's defined 

https://{SAP_DSP_TENANT}/deepsea/catalog/v1/search/search/$all?%24top=30&%24skip=0&whyfound=true&%24count=true&%24apply=filter(Search.search(query%3D%27SCOPE%3AcomsapcatalogsearchprivateSearchKPIsAdmin%20*%27))

and then if i extract the ID , using the below ,  i can get the information needed.

https://{SAP_DSP_TENANT}/deepsea/catalog/v1/kpi/{KPI_ID}

Is there any documentation regarding this topic? or any other way?

 

Thank you

entry.title: Change empty fields '-' to '0'
entry.content:
Hi

I am currently building in Datasphere but I ran into a small problem. The fields that contain no values (displayed as '-' in datasphere, get filtered out later on in my view. But fields that have a '0' as value, do not get filtered out. So an "easy" solution to this seems to convert all the empty fields into '0', but I do not manage to find the expression for this. Anyone who can help me? Thanks in advance

entry.title: Datasphere Capacity Units Usage explanation
entry.content:
Hello the community,

For Datasphere, I know we can see the consumption via SAP.ME or via the BTP Cockpit, but i would like to understand exactly how it works.

We do notice that even with really small amount of data loaded in the system, we are using most of our capacity units over a month.

What is the exact way to know how much the compute power and querying is using in terms of capacity units ? 

Imagine I have a system with 4300 CU, if I reach those 4300 units, does that mean I would not be able to load or query anymore ? 

Or is it more that I always have 8vCPU for instance available at every hour during a specific month so I would always be able to query but never going over that limit ? 

I do see some months we are a bit over the 4300 CU.. Are we going to be charged for that knowing that our pricing is not pay per use ? 

Can anyone give me more explanation on how it works exactly ? 

 

Thanks a lot for your support

Julien

entry.title: Non cumulative measure in Datasphere
entry.content:
Working with non cumulative measure in an analytic model. Stock movements by itself shows correctly in the date hierarchy.  

 

But the non cumulative stock level does not show up correctly. It just shows the latest value for all nodes of the date period. Expectation is to show the stock level at node level by period (movement doesn't show up when both measures are displayed)

Here is the definition of the non-cumulative measure, Stock Level

Sample data used =>

DateProductMovementRecord Type
2022-12-07BX-1011-162
2022-12-10BX-1011122
2022-12-14BX-1011192
2022-12-31BX-10113901
2023-01-09BX-1011-80
2023-01-14BX-1011-130
2023-01-15BX-1011-160
2023-01-18BX-1011170
2023-01-22BX-1011-100
2023-02-03BX-1011110
2023-02-06BX-1011250
2023-02-07BX-1011-200
2023-02-08BX-1011-90
2023-02-12BX-1011200
2023-02-15BX-101190
2023-02-17BX-1011110
2023-02-20BX-1011250
2023-02-25BX-1011-200
2023-02-28BX-101140
2023-03-04BX-101170
2023-03-14BX-1011-50
2023-03-15BX-1011100
2023-03-21BX-1011200
2023-03-22BX-1011230
2023-03-25BX-101190
2023-03-29BX-1011-110
2023-03-30BX-1011-130

 

What am I doing wrong here?

Thanks.

entry.title: Use SAP Datasphere for S/4HANA Data Migration Staging Tables (2Q2)
entry.content:
Hello all

as per the usual method of using the HANA Cloud DB as Staging Tables in the S/4 - is it possible to use the HANA Space from the Datasphere in the same manner?

I have tried adding the Space Admin User as per the SAP_COM_0678 Communication Arrangement, but in the S/4 I only get connection errors. Whitelisting the IP might be the issue?

Best regards

Tarran

entry.title: CDS-Views in Datasphere not visible
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to integrate CDS-View IFIGLACCTLIR in Datasphere as a remote table, but cannot find it under Extractors > ABAP_CDS, I can only find the generated table to the view in ABAP Tables. Why can I not see the CDS-View itself? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to Integrate Sybase Data into SAP Datasphere?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In the URL link below, it appears that no suitable connection methods are mentioned for using Sybase as a data source.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/be5967d099974c69b77f4549425ca4c0/eb85e157ab654152bd68a8714036e463.html?locale=en-US&q=Anywhere

Is it possible to integrate data from Sybase into SAP Datasphere, or is there another approach to using data from Sybase in SAP Datasphere?

PS. Our Adaptive Server Enterprise version is 12.5.0.3

Thanks in advance.

Mike Wu

entry.title: SAP Datasphere - Replication Flow - Started failing with Partitions' Error
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am getting the the below error messages while extracting the data via replication flows from S/4HANA. These extractions were working fine and suddenly, these errors have started appearing to many replication flows since last couple of days. All are "Initial" loads (Full loads). Deltas are working fine. Source for these replication flows are CDS views.

Error -

One or more partitions have encountered an error.

Error while accessing object queue / Calculation not finished but ACD doesn't exists for object ZCDS_VIEW_NAME (type DDLS)

Thanks!

Regards,

Mandar Damle

entry.title: How to integrate files (excel, CSV) from O365 (team/sharepoint) into datasphere
entry.content:
Hello,

what is the way, method and communication to get such data regularly that are in files into datasphere ?

thanks
